posts.author: Luigie (Luwidge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can you help us to achieved this settings we need to change the Status approval when Dropdown is something else.

What are you trying to achieve

Example
Dropdown is Flight

Status - (Approval Option)

Approved Option 1
Approved Option 2
Approved Option 3
Approved Book Internally
Approved Per Diem - Set to Disable

If Dropdown is - Per Diem
Status - (Approval Option)

Approved Option 1 - Disable
Approved Option 2 - Disable
Approved Option 3 - Disable
Approved Book Internally
